lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one serves Him. ||1||
With the jewel of spiritual wisdom, total understanding is obtained.
He alone understands, whom the Lord Himself inspires to understand.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, attachment and pride are burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਬਿਨਾਸੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਗੈ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad agiaan binaasai anadin jaagai vekhai sach soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, ignorance is dispelled; one then remains wakeful, night and day, and beholds the True Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹੈ ਥਿਰੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan rahai thir naam samaane |2|
lines.english: Then, one's coming and going cease, and one becomes stable, absorbed in the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one realizes the Lord's Presence within.
From the Perfect Guru, true understanding is obtained.
The unconscious, self-willed manmukh is enveloped in the darkness of Maya and emotional attachment.
The world is tied to birth and death.
He slanders others, and practices utter falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad har bhagat drirraae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, devotional love for the Lord is implanted.
Joining the True Congregation, the Sat Sangat, total understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸਟਾ ਕਾ ਕੀੜਾ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: visattaa kaa keerraa visattaa maeh samaavai |3|
lines.english: He is a maggot in manure, and into manure he is absorbed. ||3||
O Nanak, he is absorbed into the True Lord. ||4||10||49||
Aasaa, Third Mehl, Panch-Padhay:
One who surrenders to the Lord's Will is peaceful forever.
Through the Perfect Guru, he merges with the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naa fir marai na aavai jaae |
lines.english: He does not die any more, and he does not come or go.
He is united with the True Guru, the Guru, the Lord God.
One who dies in the Word of the Shabad, finds eternal bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਿਸੇਖੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: te anadin naam sadaa dhiaaveh gur poore te bhagat visekh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: night and day, meditates forever on the Naam; he obtains the wondrous blessing of devotional love from the Perfect Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਲੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: jina kau naam likhiaa dhur lekh |
lines.english: One who has the Naam, the Name of the Lord, written in his pre-ordained destiny,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jina kau har prabh le milaae |
lines.english: Those, whom the Lord God has blended with Himself

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਕੀ ਗਹਣ ਗਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tina kee gehan gat kahee na jaae |
lines.english: their sublime state cannot be described.
of the most exalted order, and I am absorbed into the Lord's Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare su aape aap |
lines.english: Whatever the Lord does, He does all by Himself.
The Perfect True Guru has given the Glorious Greatness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਘਾਲੇ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je sau ghaale thaae na paae |3|
lines.english: Even hundreds of times, the mortal is not approved. ||3||
In an instant, He establishes, and disestablishes.
By merely speaking, talking, shouting and preaching about the Lord,
they listen to the True Word of the Guru's Bani, the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾਂ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸੈ ਤਹਾਂ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jahaan sabad vasai tahaan dukh jaae |
lines.english: Pain departs, from that place where the Shabad abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕੈ ਪੋਤੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jina kai potai pun tinaa guroo milaae |
lines.english: The Guru meets with those, who take virtue as their treasure;
It is bestowed only by the True Lord.
By the jewel of spiritual wisdom, one is easily absorbed into the True Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵੈ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naavai jevadd hor dhan naahee koe |
lines.english: No other wealth is as great as the Naam.
Aasaa, Third Mehl:
Through the Perfect Word of the Shabad, it abides in the mind.
O Nanak, imbued with the Naam, peace is obtained. ||5||11||50||
One may dance and play numerous instruments;

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਅੰਧਾ ਬੋਲਾ ਹੈ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man andhaa bolaa hai kis aakh sunaae |
lines.english: but this mind is blind and deaf, so for whose benefit is this speaking and preaching?
Deep within is the fire of greed, and the dust-storm of doubt.
The lamp of knowledge is not burning, and understanding is not obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aap pachhaan milai prabh soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Understanding his own self, he meets God. ||1||Pause||
The Gurmukh has the light of devotional worship within his heart.
to the beat of the drum, he sheds his ego from within.
The Gurmukh's dance is to embrace love for the Lord;
My God is True; He Himself is the Knower of all.
The Gurmukh is filled with devotional love for the Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad antar braham pachhaan |2|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, recognize the Creator Lord within yourself. ||2||
But the dances and the worship of the hypocrites bring only pain. ||3||
He intuitively reflects upon the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
For the Gurmukh, loving devotional worship is the way to the True Lord.
